## PR 7: Story Layer Review Gate UI Shell

### Scope

Adds the first user-facing Story Layer Review Gate workspace shell at:

- `/workspace/[evaluationProjectId]/story-layer`

This PR is intentionally stacked on PR #634. It should be retargeted after upstream PRs merge.

### Why

PR 4 writes the raw Story Layer and quality report artifacts. PR 5 normalizes explicit Review Gate feedback into `accepted_story_ledger_v1`. PR 6 adds non-governing support artifacts. PR 7 introduces the UI shell that will eventually read those artifacts and capture review intent without performing artifact writes inside React components.

### In scope

- Add a light workspace shell for Story Layer review.
- Render the eight canonical Story Layer index items.
- Add placeholder panels for identity resolution, evidence anchors, artifact status, and review disposition.
- Keep approval CTA disabled and hard-locked.
- State clearly in UI copy that artifact writes remain in the PR5 normalizer boundary.

### Out of scope

- Direct database mutations from React components.
- Server action/API implementation.
- Artifact loading from Supabase.
- PR5 normalizer invocation.
- Phase 2 execution or unlock behavior.
- Support artifact generation.
- WAVE revision UI or metrics.

### Files added

- `app/workspace/[evaluationProjectId]/story-layer/page.tsx`

### UX safety contract

The approval action is disabled in this shell. Future wiring must keep the action hard-locked when `ledger_quality_report_v1.hard_fail_present` is true unless a verified `admin` or `operator` override path is present.

### Reviewer note

This PR must remain UI shell only. Reject any commit that writes artifacts, mutates DB state, runs model/evaluation code, unlocks Phase 2, or adds approval bypass behavior.
